# AppClipHeaderImageCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClipDefaultExperienceLocalization

**Object**

The relationship to the Default App Clip Experience Localizations resource you set with the request that creates an App Clip Header Images resource.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipHeaderImageCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClipDefaultExperienceLocalization
```

## Objects

- **AppClipHeaderImageCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClipDefaultExperienceLocalization.Data**: The type and ID of the Default App Clip Localizations resource that you’re relating with the App Clip Header Images resource you’re creating.
